name: Heavenly Jam
recipeIngredient: 1 cup orange juice (or juice of 2 oranges)
3 tablespoons orange rind (or rind of 1 orange, cut fine)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the cherries in a large saucepan.
2. Cook gently for 1 1/2 to 2 hours over low heat, stirring occasionally until the mixture thickens and reduces.
3. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
4. Ladle into hot, sterilized jars, leaving some headspace at the top.
5. Seal with melted paraffin wax.
6. Allow to cool completely before storing.
Makes 12 baby food jars.
